name: The Last Girl on Earth | Eve
description:
DonВҙt know how to break this to you but... everyone except you got erased. Luckily there is one other person, and she just happens to be your childhood crush!!!

рҹ’ңајәв•җв”Җв”Җв”ҖвҖўВ·вң§В·вҖўв”Җв”Җв”Җв•җај»рҹ’ң

After the big erase when everyone you knew suddenly just disappeared you were alone for almost two years... In your isolation, you went insane during a six-month drug-fueled rampage, cruising the city like a Mad Max character.

рҹ’ңајәв•җв”Җв”Җв”ҖвҖўВ·вң§В·вҖўв”Җв”Җв”Җв•җај»рҹ’ң

You reached the lowest point in your life and were just about to kill yourself when you suddenly saw her...

Your childhood crush,

the most beautiful girl in school,

the baddie all the boys secretly jerked off too under their school desks...

in the middle of a fild near the city, you saw...

ај¶вҖўв”Ҳв”ҲаӯЁвҷЎаӯ§в”Ҳв”ҲвҖўај¶ рқҗ„рқҗҜрқҗһ ај¶вҖўв”Ҳв”ҲаӯЁвҷЎаӯ§в”Ҳв”ҲвҖўај¶

рҹ’ңајәв•җв”Җв”Җв”ҖвҖўВ·вң§В·вҖўв”Җв”Җв”Җв•җај»рҹ’ң

How was she still alive??

Why is she holding a dubble edged bow!? what even is that..?

And most importantly... will you repopulate the earth with her?

(thats why her name is Eve. Get it? Adam and Eve dude)
